evals.prompt: I changed the ForecastCategory field directly on an Opportunity record via the API but it keeps getting reset. Why?
expected_topics: ForecastCategory is derived from StageName mapping
OpportunityStage metadata controls the ForecastCategory per stage
Changing ForecastCategory directly has no lasting effect without StageName change
Setup → Opportunity Stages is where the mapping is configured

evals.prompt: I'm getting a FIELD_INTEGRITY_EXCEPTION when I try to insert an OpportunityLineItem. What's causing this?
expected_topics: Opportunity.Pricebook2Id must be set before inserting OpportunityLineItem
PricebookEntryId must reference a PricebookEntry from the same pricebook as Opportunity.Pricebook2Id
Mismatched pricebook between OpportunityLineItem.PricebookEntryId and Opportunity.Pricebook2Id
Set Opportunity.Pricebook2Id first, then insert line items

evals.prompt: Why can't I set Opportunity.Amount when the opportunity already has products added?
expected_topics: Opportunity.Amount is auto-calculated from OpportunityLineItem.TotalPrice when line items exist
Amount becomes read-only when HasOpportunityLineItem is true
FIELD_NOT_WRITEABLE error when attempting to write Amount with line items present
Remove all OpportunityLineItem records first to regain direct control of Amount

evals.prompt: An opportunity has three contacts linked to it and my report shows multiple 'primary' contacts. How do I fix this?
expected_topics: OpportunityContactRole.IsPrimary must be true on exactly one record per opportunity
Salesforce does not enforce uniqueness of IsPrimary at the platform level
Need a trigger or validation rule to enforce a single IsPrimary = true per opportunity
Query OpportunityContactRole where OpportunityId = X and IsPrimary = true to find duplicates

evals.prompt: We have two quotes on an opportunity and I set the second one to sync. Now the first quote says IsSyncing = false. Is this a bug?
expected_topics: Only one Quote can have IsSyncing = true per opportunity at a time
Setting a second Quote to IsSyncing = true automatically unsyncs the previous syncing quote
This is expected platform behavior, not a bug
QuoteLineItem changes from the syncing quote flow back to OpportunityLineItem

evals.prompt: Our reps are jumping straight from Prospecting to Closed Won and bypassing all intermediate stages. How do we enforce stage progression?
expected_topics: StageName transitions are not platform-enforced by default
Validation rules can block stage advances unless required fields are populated
Path configuration with entry criteria provides guided selling but does not block saves
Apex trigger on before update can enforce complex stage-entry criteria using PRIORVALUE(StageName)

evals.prompt: I tried to delete an OpportunityHistory record in Apex and got an error. How do I clean up the history?
expected_topics: OpportunityHistory is a read-only system-managed object
DML operations (insert, update, delete) are not permitted on OpportunityHistory
OpportunityHistory records cannot be deleted or modified
OpportunityHistory is the system audit trail for StageName, Amount, Probability, ForecastCategory, and CloseDate changes

evals.prompt: Our reps keep overriding Probability on their deals and then it gets reset when they change the stage. What's happening?
expected_topics: Opportunity.Probability is auto-set from the stage's default probability percentage when StageName changes
Manual edits to Probability are overwritten by the next StageName change
Use a custom OverrideProbability__c field for deal-specific probability
Setup → Forecast Settings → Allow overriding of probability can be enabled to prevent auto-reset

evals.prompt: We want to measure the impact of all our marketing campaigns on closed won deals, not just the last-touch campaign. How do we set this up in Salesforce?
expected_topics: CampaignInfluence object links Campaign, Opportunity, and Contact for multi-touch attribution
Opportunity.CampaignId is a single primary campaign source field — not suitable for multi-touch
CampaignInfluence must be enabled in Setup → Campaign Influence
Attribution models: First Touch, Last Touch, Even Distribution, Custom

evals.prompt: I'm trying to insert an OpportunityTeamMember with role 'Regional Director' but getting INVALID_OR_NULL_FOR_RESTRICTED_PICKLIST. That role exists in our other sandbox.
expected_topics: TeamMemberRole is a restricted picklist with org-specific values
Opportunity Team Roles are configured in Setup → Opportunity Team Roles
Each org has its own set of valid TeamMemberRole values — they are not shared across orgs
Query the target org's OpportunityTeamMember describe or Setup to get valid values before inserting

evals.prompt: What happens if I don't set CloseDate when creating a new Opportunity and just leave it blank?
expected_topics: CloseDate is a required field on Opportunity — the record cannot be saved without it
Integration patterns that default CloseDate to today's date pollute pipeline reports with past-due dates
CloseDate should be a realistic future date based on the expected close timeline
Pipeline reports and forecast views filter on CloseDate — a past or junk date breaks these reports

evals.prompt: I'm importing OpportunityLineItems via Bulk API. Should I include TotalPrice, Quantity, and UnitPrice all three in my CSV?
expected_topics: TotalPrice is calculated as Quantity × UnitPrice and should not be set directly
Providing TotalPrice alongside Quantity and UnitPrice causes a field conflict error
Bulk API import for OpportunityLineItem should include Quantity and UnitPrice; omit TotalPrice
Discount field is a percentage that modifies UnitPrice — TotalPrice will auto-calculate
